hooks.description: After any Write or Edit tool call during a reverse-engineer build phase, check if the modified file deviates from the blueprint's specifications. Logs drift warnings to .reverse-engineer/build-log.md for the drift-detector to process later.

steps.command: if [ -f .reverse-engineer/blueprint.md ] && [ -f .reverse-engineer/build-log.md ]; then echo "[$(date -Iseconds)] File modified: $CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" >> .reverse-engineer/build-log.md; fi

hooks.description: After Bash tool runs during build phases, capture command outputs that may indicate build errors, test failures, or lint issues. Appends to build log for self-healer to process.

steps.command: if [ -f .reverse-engineer/build-log.md ]; then echo "[$(date -Iseconds)] Shell command executed during build" >> .reverse-engineer/build-log.md; fi
